identifierField.description: Field used to query the entity store for index-type sources

integrationName.description: Required when type is entity_analytics_integration. One of entityanalytics_okta, entityanalytics_ad.

queryRule.description: KQL query used to filter data from the provided index patterns

entitySources.description: Optional entity sources to create and link to the watchlist

managed.description: Indicates if the watchlist is managed by the system

riskModifier.description: Risk score modifier associated with the watchlist
